Borderlands Collection: Pandora's Box  This title is included in Borderlands Collection: Pandora's Box!
       
 
  About the Game A new era of shoot and loot is about to begin. Play as one of four new vault hunters facing off against a massive new world of creatures, psychos and the evil mastermind, Handsome Jack.  Make new friends, arm them with a bazillion weapons and fight alongside them in 4 player co-op on a relentless quest for revenge and redemption across the undiscovered and unpredictable living planet. Key Features:    All-New Characters and All-New Classes:  Four all new playable classes including the Siren, the Commando, the Gunzerker and the Assassin. Step into the role of the Gunzerker, whose highly deadly skills allow him to dual-wield any two weapons found in the game. Not only that, you will build on that skill to do more things with two guns than you ever imagined possible. Dual machine guns? Cool. Dual rocket launchers? Of course! Dual Sniper Rifles? Sure, if that’s your thing! Want to try other styles? More tactical perhaps? There are multiple classes to choose from!
 
    Dynamic Co-op online, and LAN:  Share your adventures with friends both online and via LAN. Borderlands 2 features a seamless system enabling you to drop in and drop out of a campaign without ever having to restart the game. On top of that you can even take your new gear from any game to any other!
 
    World Connected Story:   Find yourself left for dead in the frozen tundra of Pandora as you begin your quest of revenge and redemption. Expose the evil surrounding the Hyperion Corporation and take on the perpetrator of a universe-wide grand deception -- the nefarious Hyperion CEO, Handsome Jack. (Oh, also: he's stolen credit for the opening of the Vault.)
 
    87 Bazillion...Everything:  In addition to the new gun system, you will lust after procedurally generated shields, grenades, Relics, class mods and much, much more. And you thought the original Borderlands had a ton of loot!
 
    Brand new environments on Pandora:  Hunt through entirely brand new areas of Pandora that are more alive than ever!  From the arctic tundra, through the dangerous grasslands, past the mysterious corrosive caverns to beyond, you’ll be surprised by the unpredictable world of Pandora at every turn!
 
    Brand new enemies:   A whole slew of new enemies are out there to kill you in Borderlands 2. Hulking, gorilla-like Bullymongs, vicious predatory Stalkers and the Hyperion mechanical army, run by Handsome Jack, are just some of the new enemies in Borderlands 2.  Note: The Mac and Linux versions of Borderlands 2 are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

Borderlands Collection: Caja de Pandora  ¡Este título está incluido en Borderlands Collection: Caja de Pandora!
       
 
  Acerca del juego Una nueva era de disparos y saqueos está a punto de comenzar. Juega como uno de los cuatro nuevos buscadores de la Cámara y enfréntate a legiones de nuevas criaturas, psicópatas y al villano que las controla, Jack el Guapo. Haz nuevos amigos, equípalos con un cillón de armas y pelea a su lado en partidas cooperativas de 4 jugadores, en una implacable búsqueda de venganza y redención a través de un desconocido e impredecible planeta. Características principales:    Personajes y clases completamente nuevos:  Cuatro nuevas clases que incluyen a la Sirena, el Soldado, el Gunzerker y el Asesino. Juega como el Gunzerker, cuyas mortales habilidades le permiten llevar a la vez dos armas de cualquier tipo. No solo eso, según mejore esa habilidad, podrás hacer con ellas más cosas de las que jamás hayas imaginado. ¿Dos ametralladoras? Pues vale. ¿Dos lanzacohetes? ¡Desde luego! ¿Dos rifles de francotirador? ¡Pues claro, si es lo que te gusta! ¿Quieres probar otros estilos? ¿Quizá algo más táctico? ¡Hay muchas clases entre las que elegir!
 
    Dinámico modo cooperativo por Internet y en LAN:  Comparte tus aventuras con tus amigos tanto por Internet como por LAN. El fluido sistema de juego de Borderlands 2 te permitirá entrar y salir de una campaña sin tener que reiniciar la partida. Y lo mejor de todo, ¡podrás llevar tus armas de una partida a otra!
 
    Historia ligada al planeta:  Comienzas tu aventura de venganza y redención abandonado a tu suerte en la helada tundra de Pandora. Pon al descubierto la maldad que rodea a la Compañía Hyperion y enfréntate al autor de un engaño a escala universal: el infame presidente ejecutivo de Hyperion, Jack el Guapo. (Oh, por cierto: se ha atribuido a sí mismo el mérito de haber abierto la Cámara). 
 
    87 cillones... de todo:  Además del nuevo sistema de armas, la codicia te llevará tras escudos, granadas, Reliquias, modificadores de clase y muchas cosas más, todas ellas generadas por algoritmos. ¡Y tú que creías que el Borderlands original tenía ya un montón de botín!
 
    Entornos completamente nuevos en Pandora:  Caza en áreas completamente nuevas de Pandora, ¡mucho más vivas que nunca! Desde la tundra ártica a peligrosas praderas, pasando por misteriosas cavernas corrosivas y más allá, ¡Pandora no va a dejar de sorprenderte!
 
    Enemigos totalmente nuevos:  Un montón de enemigos nuevos te esperan para matarte en Borderlands 2. Descomunales y corpulentos Bullymongs, despiadados y sigilosos Stalkers y el ejército mecánico de Hyperion, dirigido por Jack el Guapo, son solo algunos de los nuevos enemigos que verás en Borderlands 2.  Nota: La versión para Mac de Borderlands 2 sólo está disponible en inglés, francés, italiano, alemán y español.

Borderlands Collection : La boîte de Pandore  Ce titre est inclus dans Borderlands Collection : La boîte de Pandore !
       
 
  À propos du jeu Une nouvelle ère de jeu de tir et de découverte débarque. Incarnez l'un des 4 chasseurs d'Arche et affrontez un gigantesque monde de créatures et de sociopathes, sans oublier le diabolique Beau Jack. Faites-vous de nouveaux amis, armez-les jusqu'aux dents et combattez ensemble à 4 en coopération dans une quête de vengeance et de rédemption sur une planète vivante imprévisible et inexplorée. Caractéristiques :    De nouveaux personnages, de nouvelles classes :  Faites votre choix parmi 4 nouveaux personnages jouables et de nouvelles classes incluant la Sirène, le Commando, le Défourailleur et l'Assassin. Jouez le rôle du Défourailleur, capable de manier deux armes trouvées dans le jeu à la fois. En plus, vous pourrez faire des choses encore plus dingues avec ce talent au fur et à mesure de votre progression. Deux mitrailleuses ? C'est sympa. Deux lance-roquettes ? Explosif ! Deux fusils de précision ? Chacun son truc, mais pourquoi pas ! Vous voulez vous essayer à de nouvelles choses ? Quelque chose de plus tactique peut-être ? Il y a de nombreuses classes à votre disposition pour faire votre choix.
 
    Parties dynamiques en co-op et en réseau local :  Partagez vos aventures avec des amis en ligne ou en réseau grâce à un système fluide vous permettant de rejoindre ou quitter une campagne sans jamais avoir à relancer le jeu. Encore mieux, vous pouvez utiliser la matériel et l'équipement que vous avez récupéré lors d'une précédente partie.
 
    Un scénario connecté au monde :  Vous commencez votre quête de vengeance et de rédemption à demi mort dans la toundra gelée de Pandore, et le scénario vous rapproche peu à peu d'Hyperion Corporation et de son diabolique fondateur, le Beau Jack. (Ah, aussi : il a volé de l'argent pour l'ouverture de l'Arche.)
 
    87 trilliards de... tout :  On ne trouve pas que des armes à feu sur Pandore, vous tomberez aussi sur des générateurs de bouclier, des grenades, des artefacts extraterrestres, des mods de classe et beaucoup, beaucoup d'autres choses encore !
 
    De tout nouveaux environnements sur Pandore :  "Baladez-vous" dans de nouvelles zones de Pandore qui sont plus animées que jamais ! De la toundra arctique jusqu'à une dangereuse prairie, en passant par une mystérieuse caverne corrosive, découvrez de nouvelles région sur l'imprévisible Pandore !
 
    Tout nouveaux ennemis :  Affrontez de nombreux nouveaux ennemis, tels que d'énormes Garogos simiesques, de cruels Rôdeurs prédateurs et l'armée mécanique d'Hyperion, avec à sa tête le Beau Jack. Ce ne sont que quelques uns des nombreux nouveaux ennemis de Borderlands 2  Note : La version Mac de Borderlands 2 est disponible en anglais, français, italien, allemand et espagnol.

Borderlands Collection: Pandoras Büchse  Dieser Titel ist enthalten in Borderlands Collection: Pandoras Büchse!
       
 
  Infos zum Spiel Eine neue Ära des Schießen und Plünderns beginnt. Spielen Sie als einer von vier neuen Vault-Huntern in einer gewaltigen, neuen Welt voll von Kreaturen, Psychopathen und dem bösen Superhirn, Handsome Jack. Finden Sie neue Freunde, rüsten Sie sich mit einer Bazillion Waffen aus und kämpfen Sie an derer Seite im 4 Spieler-Coop für das unerbittliche Streben nach Rache auf einem unerforschten und unberechenbaren Planeten! Hauptmerkmale:    Komplett neue Charaktere und komplett neue Klassen:  Mit der Sirene, dem Commando, dem Gunzerker und dem Assassinen gibt es 4 brandneue Klassen. Schlüpfen Sie in die Rolle des Gunzerkers, dessen absolut tödliche Fähigkeiten ihm erlauben, zwei beliebige Waffen im Spiel gleichzeitig abzufeuern. Darüber hinaus ist es möglich, die Fähigkeit so auszubauen, dass Sie mehr Dinge mit zwei Waffen machen können, als Sie sich je haben träumen lassen. Zwei Maschinenpistolen? Cool. Zwei Raketenwerfer? Auf jeden Fall! Zwei Scharfschützengewehre? Natürlich, wem es gefällt! Sie möchten andere Stile ausprobieren? Vielleicht etwas taktischer? Es gibt mehrere Klassen, aus denen Sie wählen können!
 
    Dynamischer Online- und Lan-Coop:  Erleben Sie Ihre Abenteuer mit Freunden, entweder online oder über LAN. Borderlands 2 bietet ein nahtloses System, was es erlaubt, einem Spiel beizutreten oder es zu verlassen, ohne neustarten zu müssen. Obendrein können Sie Ihre Ausrüstung von jedem Spiel in ein beliebiges, anderes mitnehmen.
 
    Eine packende Story:  Finden Sie sich am Anfang Ihres Strebens nach Rache in der gefrorenen Tundra Pandoras wieder. Enthüllen Sie die üblen Machenschaften der Hyperion Corporation und nehmen Sie es mit dem Drahtzieher einer Planetenweiten Verschwörung auf – dem ruchlosen Hyperion CEO, Handsome Jack. (Oh, außerdem behauptet er, dass er die Vault selbst geöffnet hätte!)
 
    87 Bazillion…von allem:  Zusätzlich zu dem neuen Waffensystem werden Sie hinter prozedural generierten Schilden, Granaten, Klassen-Modifikationen und vielem, vielem mehr her sein. Und Sie haben gedacht, im ersten Borderlands gab es schon massenweise Beute!
 
    Brandneue Umgebungen auf Pandora:  Jagen Sie durch die nagelneuen Gebiete Pandoras, die lebendiger sind als je zuvor! Von der arktischen Tundra, über die gefährlichen Grasslands, bis hin zu den Höhlen außerhalb werden Sie von der unvorhersehbaren Welt Pandoras jedes Mal auf’s Neue überrascht!
 
    Brandneue Gegner:  Eine ganze Menge neuer Gegner warten da draußen darauf, Sie zu töten. Sich aufbäumende, Gorilla-ähnliche Bullymongs, bösartige, räuberische Stalker und die mechanische Hyperion-Armee, geleitet von Handsome Jack, sind nur ein paar der neuen Gegner in Borderlands 2.  Achtung: Die Mac-Version von Borderlands 2 ist nur auf Englisch, Französisch, Italienisch, Deutsch und Spanisch verfügbar.

Borderlands Collection: Pandora's Box  This title is included in Borderlands Collection: Pandora's Box!
       
 
  Acerca do jogo A new era of shoot and loot is about to begin. Play as one of four new vault hunters facing off against a massive new world of creatures, psychos and the evil mastermind, Handsome Jack.  Make new friends, arm them with a bazillion weapons and fight alongside them in 4 player co-op on a relentless quest for revenge and redemption across the undiscovered and unpredictable living planet. Key Features:    All-New Characters and All-New Classes:  Four all new playable classes including the Siren, the Commando, the Gunzerker and the Assassin. Step into the role of the Gunzerker, whose highly deadly skills allow him to dual-wield any two weapons found in the game. Not only that, you will build on that skill to do more things with two guns than you ever imagined possible. Dual machine guns? Cool. Dual rocket launchers? Of course! Dual Sniper Rifles? Sure, if that’s your thing! Want to try other styles? More tactical perhaps? There are multiple classes to choose from!
 
    Dynamic Co-op online, and LAN:  Share your adventures with friends both online and via LAN. Borderlands 2 features a seamless system enabling you to drop in and drop out of a campaign without ever having to restart the game. On top of that you can even take your new gear from any game to any other!
 
    World Connected Story:   Find yourself left for dead in the frozen tundra of Pandora as you begin your quest of revenge and redemption. Expose the evil surrounding the Hyperion Corporation and take on the perpetrator of a universe-wide grand deception -- the nefarious Hyperion CEO, Handsome Jack. (Oh, also: he's stolen credit for the opening of the Vault.)
 
    87 Bazillion...Everything:  In addition to the new gun system, you will lust after procedurally generated shields, grenades, Relics, class mods and much, much more. And you thought the original Borderlands had a ton of loot!
 
    Brand new environments on Pandora:  Hunt through entirely brand new areas of Pandora that are more alive than ever!  From the arctic tundra, through the dangerous grasslands, past the mysterious corrosive caverns to beyond, you’ll be surprised by the unpredictable world of Pandora at every turn!
 
    Brand new enemies:   A whole slew of new enemies are out there to kill you in Borderlands 2. Hulking, gorilla-like Bullymongs, vicious predatory Stalkers and the Hyperion mechanical army, run by Handsome Jack, are just some of the new enemies in Borderlands 2.  Note: The Mac and Linux versions of Borderlands 2 are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

无主之地2是2009年的无主之地1的正统续作，是一款科幻第一人称射击于角色扮演元素结合的游戏。目前正在由Gearbox开发，支持xbox360、PS3以及Microsoft Windows平台。将于2012年9月18日发售。

game.brief:
A new era of shoot and loot is about to begin. Play as one of four new vault hunters facing off against a massive new world of creatures, psychos and the evil mastermind, Handsome Jack. Make new friends, arm them with a bazillion weapons and fight alongside them in 4 player co-op on a relentless quest for revenge and redemption across the undiscovered and unpredictable living planet.

Five years after the events of Borderlands, a valuable mineral called "Eridium" starts flourishing through Pandora's crust. Handsome Jack, the leader of the Hyperion Corporation, secures this new resource and uses it to rule over Pandora with an iron fist. Meanwhile, rumors of an even larger Vault hidden on Pandora spread across the galaxy, drawing a new group of Vault Hunters to the planet in search of it.

game.title: Thank Goodness You're Here!

localized_description.text: 《Thank Goodness You're Here!》是一款荒诞喜剧跳台游戏，故事发生在英格兰北部一座充满奇人怪事的小镇——巴恩斯沃斯。你不远万里来到镇上推销产品，顺便见识一下这里的风土人情。没想到镇民们纷纷上赶着欠你人情，塞给你的杂活儿一件赛一件奇葩……

Explora la estrafalaria ciudad de Barnsworth en este burlón plataformas cómico. 
 
 Tras llegar pronto a una gran reunión con el alcalde de una singular ciudad en el norte de Inglaterra, un vendedor ambulante aprovecha para explorar el lugar y conocer a los lugareños, que están deseosos de encargarle trabajos cada vez más disparatados...
  
 "Thank Goodness You're Here!" es un plataformas de comedia cuya complejidad aumenta gradualmente conforme los jugadores dejan huella en la extraña ciudad de Barnsworth. Con cada encargo completado se abren nuevas zonas de la ciudad y encargos aún más disparatados. Mientras, el tiempo corre hacia la reunión del vendedor. Los habitantes de la ciudad cobran vida con animaciones coloridas dibujadas a mano, diálogo completamente doblado al inglés y dobles sentidos por todas partes.
 
   Características:   Un diseño visual atrevido que combina secciones de acción con vista lateral y exploración vista desde arriba en un mundo repleto de cosas que ver.
   Involúcrate cada vez más y ocúpate de toda clase de encargos: corta el césped, hornea una tarta, ¡recorre el plano astral!
   Animación a mano y una historia original basada en el folklore de Yorkshire.
   Dialectos regionales británicos desternillantes.
   Una banda sonora original extrañamente conmovedora.

Explorez l'étrange ville de Barnsworth dans ce jeu de claqueforme drôle et osé ! 
 
 Arrivé en avance pour un important rendez-vous avec le maire d'une étrange ville du nord de l'Angleterre, un commercial itinérant prend le temps de visiter la commune et de rencontrer les gens du coin, qui sont tous ravis de lui confier des tâches de plus en plus absurdes… 
  
  "Thank Goodness You're Here!" est un jeu de claqueforme humoristique qui se dévoile au fil de votre exploration et de vos pitreries dans la drôle de ville de Barnsworth. Chaque fois que vous terminez l'une des tâches farfelues qui vous sont confiées, de nouvelles zones de la ville se débloquent, des missions encore plus saugrenues deviennent accessibles tandis que l'heure tourne, vous rapprochant de votre rendez-vous. Les habitants hauts en couleur de la ville prennent vie grâce à des animations éclatantes réalisées à la main, des dialogues intégralement doublés et des sous-entendus hilarants.
 
   Caractéristiques :   Une conception visuelle audacieuse et colorée qui mêle vignettes d'action à défilement latéral et exploration de haut en bas dans un monde dense et vivant.
   Des tâches étranges sous forme de puzzle qui gagnent en intensité : tondre l'herbe, préparer une tourte, ou encore traverser le plan astral !
   Des animations réalisées à la main et une histoire originale inspirée du folklore et des traditions du Yorkshire.
   Des dialectes régionaux authentiques pour vous faire rire à en recracher votre thé.
   Une bande sonore originale étrangement émouvante.

Erkunde in diesem aberwitzigen Joke ’n’ Run das skurrile Städtchen Barnsworth! 
 
 Du bist ein Handelsvertreter und hast einen Termin beim Bürgermeister einer skurrilen nordenglischen Stadt – leider bist du zu früh! Vertreibe dir deine Zeit mit einem Stadtbummel und lerne die Einheimischen kennen, die allesamt bizarre Aufträge für dich haben.
  
  „Thank Goodness You’re Here!“ ist ein abstruses Joke ’n’ Run, in dem du mit der Zeit immer mehr vom skurrilen Städtchen Barnsworth erkundest und dir unter den Einheimischen mit deinen Kapriolen einen Namen machst. Mit jedem seltsamen Auftrag werden neue Bereiche der Stadt freigeschaltet, wo dich noch bizarrere Aufträge erwarten, mit denen du dir die Zeit bis zu deinem wichtigen Termin vertreiben kannst. Die schillernden Persönlichkeiten der Stadt werden dir dank handgezeichneter Animationen, vollständig vertonter Dialoge und unzähliger Doppeldeutigkeiten noch lange in Erinnerung bleiben.
 
   Merkmale:   Ein ausdrucksvolles, wunderschönes visuelles Design, wobei sich Plattform-Action und das Erkunden einer wuseligen Welt aus der Vogelperspektive nahtlos abwechseln.
   Immer komplexere und skurrilere Aufträge, die es zu erfüllen gilt: Mähe den Rasen, backe eine Pastete und durchquere die Astralebene!
   Handgefertigte Animationen und eine originelle Handlung auf Grundlage traditioneller Folklore der Grafschaft Yorkshire.
   Authentische britische Dialekte, bei denen man sofort Lust auf Fish ’n’ Chips mit einem Schuss Essig bekommt.
   Ein überraschend ergreifender Original-Soundtrack.

Explora a vila de Barnsworth neste jogo de plataformas bem peculiar e divertido! 
 
 Ao chegar antes do tempo para uma reunião importante com o autarca de uma estranha vila do norte de Inglaterra, um caixeiro-viajante aproveita para passear e conhecer os habitantes, mas estes querem muito dar-lhe uma série de biscates estranhos… 
  
  “Thank Goodness You’re Here!” é um jogo de comédia castiço que se vai desenrolando à medida que a exploração e artimanhas do jogador deixam a sua marca na estranha vila de Barnsworth. Com cada biscate concluído, surgem novas áreas da vila, tens acesso a tarefas cada vez mais estranhas e o relógio avança rumo à grande reunião do caixeiro-viajante. Os peculiares habitantes da vila ganham vida com uma expressiva animação feita à mão, diálogos com dobragem completa e trocadilhos constantes.
 
   Caraterísticas:   Design visual arrojado e belo, que combina na perfeição as vinhetas de ação de deslocamento lateral com a exploração numa perspetiva superior. Tudo isto num mundo a abarrotar de atividades.
   Tarefas cada vez mais envolventes e intrigantes: corta a relva, coze uma tarte e… atravessa o plano astral!
   Animação feita à mão e história original baseada no folclore do condado inglês de Yorkshire.
   Dialetos regionais autênticos que te vão fazer rir às gargalhadas.
   Banda sonora original estranhamente comovente.

Udforsk den mærkelige by Barnsworth i dette sjove platformspil med smæk! 
 
 Efter at være ankommet tidligt til et vigtigt møde med borgmesteren i den bizarre nordengelske by, tager en omrejsende sælger sig tid til at udforske og møde de lokale, som alle er meget ivrige efter at give ham en række mere og mere mærkelige jobs. 
  
  "Thank Goodness You're Here!" er et platformspil smækfyldt med sjov og ballade, der udfolder sig over tid, hvor spillernes udforskning og narrestreger sætter deres præg på den mærkelige by Barnsworth. Hvert job du udfører låser op for nye områder i byen, og gør opgaver tilgængelige, der bliver mærkeligere og mærkeligere – alt imens at uret tikker mod vores sælgers vigtige møde. Byens farverige indbyggere vækkes til live med levende håndtegnede animationer og komplet indtalt dialog, der er smækfyldt med dobbeltbetydninger.
 
   Funktioner:   Dristigt og smukt design, der ubesværet kombinerer action og udforskning fra et sidekameraperspektiv, og gør dig en del af et tætpakket eventyr fuld af spas og løjer.
   Opgaver, der gradvist bliver mere indviklede og gådefulde: Slå græsset, bag en tærte, kryds det astrale plan!
   Håndlavede animationer og en original historie, der er baseret på traditionelle folkesagn fra Yorkshire.
   Realistiske regionale dialekter, dee int så ræng’ endda.
   Underligt rørende originalt soundtrack.

Esplora la pazza Barnsworth in una "giocommedia" dalla comicità irriverente! 
 
 Dopo essere arrivato in anticipo a un incontro importante con il sindaco di una strana cittadina del nord del Regno Unito, un commesso viaggiatore si prende un po' di tempo per esplorare il posto e incontrare gli abitanti del paese, che muoiono dalla voglia di affidargli incarichi sempre più strani... 
  
  "Thank Goodness You're Here!" è una "giocommedia" a piattaforme ambientata nella strana cittadina di Barnsworth, dove potrai lasciare il segno con le tue esplorazioni e avventure irriverenti. Ogni volta che completerai uno strano incarico sbloccherai nuove zone della città, così come compiti sempre più bizzarri, mentre l'orologio sancirà lo scorrere del tempo che manca all'importante incontro del nostro commesso viaggiatore. Gli stravaganti personaggi del paese prendono vita grazie a vivaci animazioni disegnate a mano, un doppiaggio eccezionale e doppi sensi onnipresenti.
 
   Il gioco include:   Un design bellissimo e accattivante che unisce fluidamente vignette d'azione a scorrimento orizzontale con una modalità di esplorazione verticale, nella cornice di un mondo affollatissimo.
   Incarichi sempre più complicati e stravaganti: taglia l'erba, cucina una torta e attraversa il piano astrale!
   Animazioni disegnate a mano e una storia originale che attinge al folklore dello Yorkshire più tradizionale.
   Dialetti regionali autentici che ti faranno ridere... o confonderanno immensamente.
   Una colonna sonora inedita, inaspettatamente commovente.

Thank Goodness You're Here! is an absurd comedy slapformer set in the bizarre Northern English town of Barnsworth. As a traveling salesman, take the time to see the sights and meet the locals, who are very eager to give you a series of increasingly odd jobs…

game.description: Control Ultimate Edition contains the main game and all previously released Expansions ("The Foundation" and "AWE") in one great value package. Winner of over 80 awards, Control is a visually stunning third-person action-adventure that will keep you on the edge of your seat.

Control is a supernatural 3rd person action-adventure will challenge you to master the combination of supernatural abilities, modifiable loadouts and reactive environments while fighting through a deep and unpredictable world.

After a secretive agency in New York is invaded by an otherworldly threat, you become the new Director struggling to regain Control.

Control is Jesse Faden’s story and her personal search for answers as she grows into the role of the Director. The world of Control has its own story, as do the allies Jesse meets along the way. Jesse works with other Bureau agents and discovers strange experiments and secrets.

位于纽约的一座秘密机构遭到异界不速之客入侵，而你成为了新的主管，誓要夺回"控制"。

在这款由 Remedy Entertainment 开发的超自然第三人称动作冒险游戏中，你将运用超自然能力、自定义装备和互动环境，在一个深不可测的世界中展开大战。

在《Control》故事中，杰西·芳登（Jesse Faden）孤身寻找答案，逐渐成长为一名指挥官。《Control》的世界有自己的故事，杰西在旅程中遇到的同伴也都有着各自的故事。杰西和联邦控制局的其他特工并肩作战，联手揭发种种奇怪的实验和秘密。

game.title: Tomb Raider
game.description:
Tomb Raider explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold.

he game begins with Lara setting out on her first expedition aboard the ship Endurance, with the intention of finding the lost kingdom of Yamatai. By her suggestion and against Whitman's advice, the expedition ventures into the Dragon's Triangle, east of Japan. The ship is struck by a violent storm and shipwrecked, leaving the survivors stranded on an isolated island. Lara is separated from the others and captured by a strange, savage man. She manages to escape while her captor is killed as the cave collapses due to her actions. As Lara tries to locate the other survivors, she finds more evidence that the island is inhabited, such as strange carvings, dead bodies, and animal sacrifices. She eventually finds her friend Sam and a man called Mathias, who claims to be a teacher who was shipwrecked on the island. As Sam tells Mathias the legends of Himiko, Lara passes out; when she wakes, Mathias and Sam are nowhere in sight. When Lara regroups with the other survivors, Whitman decides to go with Lara and search for the still-missing Roth, while the rest of the group (Reyes, Jonah, Alex and Grim) set out to find Sam and Mathias. As Lara and Whitman explore, they discover that the island's inhabitants are worshipping Himiko, confirming that the island is Yamatai. Upon discovering a shrine erected in Himiko's name, they are captured by the islanders and taken to a settlement along with several other survivors from the Endurance. When the survivors attempt an escape, the captors turn on them. Lara is separated from Whitman and tries to hide, but is found by one of the islanders and forced to kill him. She fights off the remainder of the attackers and reunites with Roth, saving him from a wolf attack.

Lara manages to activate a radio tower and call for help, but the plane that answers the call is struck by a freak storm, and Lara hears a mysterious voice saying "No one leaves" in Japanese. Unable to save the surviving pilots, Lara is contacted by Alex and Reyes, who reveal that Sam has been kidnapped by the islanders, a violent cult known as the Solarii Brotherhood. Lara tries to rescue her, but is stopped by Mathias, leader of the Solarii, and ordered killed: she is saved by an attack from samurai-like Oni. Escaping the ancient monastery where she is taken by the Oni, she hears from Sam that Mathias is going to put her through the "Ascension", a "fire ritual" to find the next Sun Queen that will burn her to death if it is unsuccessful. Lara follows them to the Solarii fortress and is aided by Grim. The Solarii take Grim hostage, but he sacrifices himself so Lara can escape. With Roth's aid, Lara infiltrates the fortress and sees the ritual begin. When the fires are lit, a great wind blows them out, showing Sam to be the next Sun Queen. Lara escapes again and reunites with her friends, forming a plan to rescue Sam and escape. Aided by Whitman—who has managed to negotiate some degree of freedom with the Solarii—Lara returns to the palace to rescue Sam as Roth commandeers a helicopter to get them out. Lara succeeds, but persuades Sam to escape by land when she sees another storm gathering as the helicopter approaches. As Lara tries to force the helicopter pilot to land, they are brought down, with Lara nearly dying. Roth revives Lara, then takes a fatal blow from Mathias meant for Lara. While mourning Roth, Lara accepts that the storms are not natural, but are somehow connected to the Sun Queen and designed to prevent anyone from leaving the island. She meets up with the other survivors, who have evaded the Solarii long enough to secure a boat for escaping the island, provided that it can be repaired. They are joined by Whitman, who claims to have escaped, though Lara begins to suspect him of working with the cultists. Lara and Alex find parts for the boat in the wreck of the Endurance. They come under attack by the Solarii and Alex triggers an explosion, sacrificing himself so that Lara can escape with the tools.

Finding an account of a World War II-era Japanese military and Nazi scientific expedition to the island that sought a way to harness the storms as a weapon, Lara decides to explore a coastal tomb, where she finds the remains of a samurai general who committed seppuku. It is revealed in a message he left that he led the Queen's Stormguard, the Oni that defend the monastery, and that the Queen's successor took her own life rather than receive the Sun Queen's power. Lara realizes that the Ascension is not a ceremony to crown a new queen, but rather a ritual that transfers the original Sun Queen's soul into a new body; the Sun Queen had learned to become effectively immortal by transferring her soul into a young girl's body each time she grew old. The last priestess' suicide had interrupted the ritual, and left the Queen's soul trapped in her old decaying body, and Himiko's spirit has wanted to escape that corpse ever since. As a descendant of Yamatai, Sam is a viable candidate, and Mathias plans to offer Sam as a new host in exchange for his freedom. Lara returns to the survivors on the beach to find that Whitman has betrayed them, abducting Sam and handing her over to Mathias. Lara, Jonah and Reyes give chase, heading up a river to the monastery, with Lara arriving just in time to see Mathias trick Whitman into approaching and speaking to the Oni: the Oni kill Whitman. After fighting her way through both the Solarii and the Stormguard, Lara arrives at the top of the monastery where Mathias is performing the Ascension ritual. Lara fights her way to the central platform, and after a struggle, knocks Mathias off the platform to his death. Symbolically, she does so using both her pistol and his in a dual-wield style that will later become one of her signatures. Despite Mathias' death, the ritual is already underway, with Himiko's soul starting to pour into Sam, but Lara then destroys Himiko's ancient remains, saving Sam and dispersing the storms. Lara, Sam, Reyes and Jonah then leave the island and are picked up by a cargo ship: as they sail home, Lara realizes that the mythical stories her father told her were more than stories, deciding not to return home just yet, and the screen fades to white with a proclamation of "A Survivor is Born."

Reviews and Accolades    4.4/5 "...it delivers a must-play gaming experience for action adventure fans everywhere. Welcome back, Lara, you've been missed."  - Cheat Code Central 
  
   4.5/5 "...Tomb Raider is sure to impress. Its expert sense of pacing, captivating setting, and dark tone create a truly memorable experience that's further enhanced by an immense level of detail."  - gamesradar+ 
  
   8.5/10 "I'm happy to go on record as saying this is the best Tomb Raider game I've played. Tightly produced, competent in both its puzzling and its combat, this is one reboot that manages to be unequivocally superior to its predecessors. "  - Destructoid
  
   4.5/10 "... if you're a gamer, you should play Tomb Raider. It combines high-levels of interactivity, excellent pacing, and a true bond between the player and the character on screen. "  - Game Revolution
  
   90/100 "Tomb Raider’s whole is greater than the sum of its parts, and everything combines to make this the best reboot game on the market today. "  - Game Over
 
 
  Tomb Raider Game of the Year Edition     
 Tomb Raider is a critically acclaimed action adventure that explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold. The Game of the Year edition includes the Tomb of the Lost Adventurer, 6 single player outfits for Lara, 8 multiplayer maps, and 4 characters.
 
  About the Game       
 
 Tomb Raider is a critically acclaimed action adventure that explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold. The Game of the Year edition includes the Tomb of the Lost Adventurer, 6 single player outfits for Lara.
 
  KEY FEATURES: 
   A Turning Point: Experience Lara Croft’s intense origin story from a young woman to a hardened survivor.  
   An All-New Raiding Experience: Explore a mysterious island filled with environmental puzzles, visceral combat, and tombs to discover.
   Fight to Live: Salvage resources, gain experience, and upgrade Lara’s weapons and tools to survive the island’s hostile inhabitants.
   Survive as a Team: Play a variety of multiplayer modes as Lara’s Shipmates or Yamatai’s Scavengers.

  Tomb Raider Game of the Year Edition     
 Tomb Raider es una aventura de acción aclamada por la crítica que explora los orígenes de Lara Croft y su transformación, de joven inexperta a dura superviviente. Con su instinto como arma, Lara debe luchar para huir de una isla remota y descubrir su oscura historia. La edición Game of the Year incluye la Tumba del aventurero, 6 atuendos para el modo de un jugador, 8 mapas para el modo multijugador y 4 personajes.
 
  Acerca del juego       
 
 Tomb Raider es una aventura de acción aclamada por la crítica que explora la historia intensa y cruda del origen de Lara Croft y de cómo pasó de ser una joven ingenua a convertirse una sobreviviente curtida. Armada tan solo con sus instintos y su capacidad para llevar al límite la resistencia humana, Lara debe luchar para desentrañar el pasado oscuro de una isla olvidada y escapar de su implacable control. La Game of the Year Edition incluye la Tumba del Aventurero Perdido y 6 atuendos de un jugador para Lara.
 
  CARACTERÍSTICAS PRINCIPALES: 
   Un momento decisivo: Sé testigo de la intensa historia del origen de Lara Croft y de su transformación de joven chica a endurecida superviviente.
   Una nueva experiencia en el saqueo de tumbas: Explora una misteriosa isla, en donde deberás resolver puzles, entablar batallas y descubrir tumbas.
   Lucha por sobrevivir: Salvaguarda recursos, gana experiencia y mejora las armas y herramientas de Lara para sobrevivir a los hostiles habitantes de la isla.
   Sobrevive en equipo: Ponte en el papel de los compañeros de barco de Lara o de los saqueadores Yamatai al jugar a una gran variedad de modalidades multi-jugador.

  Tomb Raider Game of the Year Edition     
 Tomb Raider est un jeu d'action-aventure acclamé par la critique narrant l'histoire sombre et intense des origines de Lara Croft, de son parcours de jeune femme à celui de survivante endurcie. Armée de son instinct de survie et de sa capacité à repousser les limites, Lara doit se battre pour dévoiler les mystères d'une île oubliée et s'échapper de son emprise. L’édition Jeu de l’année inclut le Tombeau de l’aventurier, 6 tenues pour Lara en mode solo, 8 cartes multijoueur et 4 personnages.
 
  À propos du jeu       
 
 Tomb Raider est un jeu d'action-aventure acclamé par la critique, qui explore les origines mouvementées de Lara Croft et son évolution, de jeune femme à survivante endurcie. Armée seulement de son instinct et de sa capacité à repousser les limites de l'endurance humaine, Lara doit lutter pour dévoiler l'histoire sombre d'une île oubliée et échapper à son emprise implacable. L'édition Game of the Year inclut Tomb of the Lost Adventurer, 6 tenues pour Lara en jeu solo.
 
  CARACTÉRISTIQUES: 
   Un tournant : vivez aux côtés de Lara son passage de jeune femme en apparence fragile à combattante aguerrie.
   Explorez et pillez : partez à la découverte d'une île mystérieuse truffée de puzzles liés à l'environnement, de combats intenses et de tombes à piller.
   Combattez pour survivre : récupérez des matériaux, gagnez de l'expérience, et assurez la survie de Lara en milieu hostile en améliorant ses armes et ses outils.
   Survivre ensemble : différents modes multijoueurs sont disponibles, dans lesquels vous pourrez incarner un membre de l'équipage de l'Endurance ou l'un des pilleurs de Yamatai.

  Tomb Raider Game of the Year Edition     
 Das von der Kritik gefeierte Action-Adventure Tomb Raider erzählt die düstere und packende Vorgeschichte der Wandlung Lara Crofts von einer jungen Frau zur harten Überlebenskünstlerin. Nur mit ihrem Instinkt und übermenschlicher Ausdauer bewaffnet, deckt Lara die dunkle Vergangenheit einer vergessenen Insel auf, um ihrem gnadenlosen Griff zu entkommen. Die „Game of the Year“-Edition enthält „Das Grab des Abenteurers“, sechs Single Player-Outfits für Lara, 8 Multiplayer-Karten und 4 Charaktere.
 
  Infos zum Spiel       
 
 Tomb Raider ist ein erfolgreiches Action-Adventure, das die faszinierende Hintergrundgeschichte von Lara Croft ergründet und veranschaulicht, wie aus einer jungen Frau eine kampferprobte Überlebende wurde. Lara kann sich nur auf ihre Instinkte und ihre übermenschliche Ausdauer verlassen und muss die finstere Geschichte einer vergessenen Insel enthüllen, um sich aus ihrem eisernen Griff zu befreien. Die „Spiel des Jahres“-Ausgabe enthält „Das Grab des verschollenen Abenteurers“ und 6 Einzelspieler-Outfits für Lara.
 
  SCHLÜSSELELEMENTE: 
   Wendepunkt: Erlebe Lara Crofts aufregende Anfänge und ihre Entwicklung zur knallharten Überlebenskünstlerin.
   Völlig neue Erlebnisse auf Streifzügen: Erforsche eine mysteriöse Insel voll von Umgebungsrätseln, Kämpfen und Gräbern, die es zu entdecken gilt.
   Kämpfe, um zu überleben: Berge Ressourcen, sammle Erfahrung und verbessere Laras Waffen und Werkzeuge, um gegen die feindlich gesinnten Bewohner der Insel zu bestehen.
   Im Team überleben: Spiele in einer Vielzahl von Mehrspieler-Modi Laras Schiffskameraden oder Plünderer Yamatais.

   4.5/5 "...Tomb Raider is sure to impress. Its expert sense of pacing, captivating setting, and dark tone create a truly memorable experience that's further enhanced by an immense level of detail."  - gamesradar+

Reviews and Accolades    4.4/5 "...it delivers a must-play gaming experience for action adventure fans everywhere. Welcome back, Lara, you've been missed."  - Cheat Code Central 
  
   4.5/5 "...Tomb Raider is sure to impress. Its expert sense of pacing, captivating setting, and dark tone create a truly memorable experience that's further enhanced by an immense level of detail."  - gamesradar+ 
  
   8.5/10 "I'm happy to go on record as saying this is the best Tomb Raider game I've played. Tightly produced, competent in both its puzzling and its combat, this is one reboot that manages to be unequivocally superior to its predecessors. "  - Destructoid
  
   4.5/10 "... if you're a gamer, you should play Tomb Raider. It combines high-levels of interactivity, excellent pacing, and a true bond between the player and the character on screen. "  - Game Revolution
  
   90/100 "Tomb Raider’s whole is greater than the sum of its parts, and everything combines to make this the best reboot game on the market today. "  - Game Over

Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold. The Game of the Year edition includes the Tomb of the Lost Adventurer, 6 single player outfits for Lara, 8 multiplayer maps, and 4 characters.

 Tomb Raider è un acclamato action-adventure che narra la storia appassionante di una giovane Lara Croft che da ragazza sprovveduta si trasforma in una temprata superstite. Affidandosi solo al suo istinto e a un'innata capacità di sopravvivenza, Lara deve combattere per svelare l'oscuro passato di un'isola dimenticata e sfuggire alla sua morsa micidiale. L’edizione Game of the Year include la Tomba dell’avventuriero, 6 completi per Lara, 8 mappe multigiocatore e 4 personaggi.
 
  Informazioni sul gioco       
 
 Tomb Raider è un'avventura d'azione acclamata dalla critica che approfondisce i lati più oscuri e drammatici del passato di Lara Croft, narrandone l'evoluzione da giovane donna a intrepida superstite. Armata soltanto del suo istinto e di una resistenza fuori dal comune, Lara si troverà a lottare per svelare i segreti oscuri di un'isola dimenticata che la tiene in trappola. L'edizione Game of the Year include Tomb of the Lost Adventurer e 6 tenute di Lara per giocatore singolo.
 
  CARATTERISTICHE: 
   Un punto di svolta: Vivi l'intensa storia delle origini di Lara Croft e assisti alla sua trasformazione da giovane donna a scaltra sopravvissuta.
   Una nuova esperienza: Esplora un'isola misteriosa, piena di puzzle ambientali, combattimenti coinvolgenti e antiche tombe da scoprire.
   Combatti per la vita: Raccogli materiali, ottieni esperienza e potenzia le armi di Lara per sopravvivere agli ostili abitanti dell'isola.
   Sopravvivi come un team: Gioca una varietà di modalità multiplayer nei panni dei compagni di Lara o degli sciacalli di Yamatai.

game.brief:
Tomb Raider explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold.

he game begins with Lara setting out on her first expedition aboard the ship Endurance, with the intention of finding the lost kingdom of Yamatai. By her suggestion and against Whitman's advice, the expedition ventures into the Dragon's Triangle, east of Japan. The ship is struck by a violent storm and shipwrecked, leaving the survivors stranded on an isolated island. Lara is separated from the others and captured by a strange, savage man. She manages to escape while her captor is killed as the cave collapses due to her actions. As Lara tries to locate the other survivors, she finds more evidence that the island is inhabited, such as strange carvings, dead bodies, and animal sacrifices. She eventually finds her friend Sam and a man called Mathias, who claims to be a teacher who was shipwrecked on the island. As Sam tells Mathias the legends of Himiko, Lara passes out; when she wakes, Mathias and Sam are nowhere in sight. When Lara regroups with the other survivors, Whitman decides to go with Lara and search for the still-missing Roth, while the rest of the group (Reyes, Jonah, Alex and Grim) set out to find Sam and Mathias. As Lara and Whitman explore, they discover that the island's inhabitants are worshipping Himiko, confirming that the island is Yamatai. Upon discovering a shrine erected in Himiko's name, they are captured by the islanders and taken to a settlement along with several other survivors from the Endurance. When the survivors attempt an escape, the captors turn on them. Lara is separated from Whitman and tries to hide, but is found by one of the islanders and forced to kill him. She fights off the remainder of the attackers and reunites with Roth, saving him from a wolf attack.

Lara manages to activate a radio tower and call for help, but the plane that answers the call is struck by a freak storm, and Lara hears a mysterious voice saying "No one leaves" in Japanese. Unable to save the surviving pilots, Lara is contacted by Alex and Reyes, who reveal that Sam has been kidnapped by the islanders, a violent cult known as the Solarii Brotherhood. Lara tries to rescue her, but is stopped by Mathias, leader of the Solarii, and ordered killed: she is saved by an attack from samurai-like Oni. Escaping the ancient monastery where she is taken by the Oni, she hears from Sam that Mathias is going to put her through the "Ascension", a "fire ritual" to find the next Sun Queen that will burn her to death if it is unsuccessful. Lara follows them to the Solarii fortress and is aided by Grim. The Solarii take Grim hostage, but he sacrifices himself so Lara can escape. With Roth's aid, Lara infiltrates the fortress and sees the ritual begin. When the fires are lit, a great wind blows them out, showing Sam to be the next Sun Queen. Lara escapes again and reunites with her friends, forming a plan to rescue Sam and escape. Aided by Whitman—who has managed to negotiate some degree of freedom with the Solarii—Lara returns to the palace to rescue Sam as Roth commandeers a helicopter to get them out. Lara succeeds, but persuades Sam to escape by land when she sees another storm gathering as the helicopter approaches. As Lara tries to force the helicopter pilot to land, they are brought down, with Lara nearly dying. Roth revives Lara, then takes a fatal blow from Mathias meant for Lara. While mourning Roth, Lara accepts that the storms are not natural, but are somehow connected to the Sun Queen and designed to prevent anyone from leaving the island. She meets up with the other survivors, who have evaded the Solarii long enough to secure a boat for escaping the island, provided that it can be repaired. They are joined by Whitman, who claims to have escaped, though Lara begins to suspect him of working with the cultists. Lara and Alex find parts for the boat in the wreck of the Endurance. They come under attack by the Solarii and Alex triggers an explosion, sacrificing himself so that Lara can escape with the tools.

Finding an account of a World War II-era Japanese military and Nazi scientific expedition to the island that sought a way to harness the storms as a weapon, Lara decides to explore a coastal tomb, where she finds the remains of a samurai general who committed seppuku. It is revealed in a message he left that he led the Queen's Stormguard, the Oni that defend the monastery, and that the Queen's successor took her own life rather than receive the Sun Queen's power. Lara realizes that the Ascension is not a ceremony to crown a new queen, but rather a ritual that transfers the original Sun Queen's soul into a new body; the Sun Queen had learned to become effectively immortal by transferring her soul into a young girl's body each time she grew old. The last priestess' suicide had interrupted the ritual, and left the Queen's soul trapped in her old decaying body, and Himiko's spirit has wanted to escape that corpse ever since. As a descendant of Yamatai, Sam is a viable candidate, and Mathias plans to offer Sam as a new host in exchange for his freedom. Lara returns to the survivors on the beach to find that Whitman has betrayed them, abducting Sam and handing her over to Mathias. Lara, Jonah and Reyes give chase, heading up a river to the monastery, with Lara arriving just in time to see Mathias trick Whitman into approaching and speaking to the Oni: the Oni kill Whitman. After fighting her way through both the Solarii and the Stormguard, Lara arrives at the top of the monastery where Mathias is performing the Ascension ritual. Lara fights her way to the central platform, and after a struggle, knocks Mathias off the platform to his death. Symbolically, she does so using both her pistol and his in a dual-wield style that will later become one of her signatures. Despite Mathias' death, the ritual is already underway, with Himiko's soul starting to pour into Sam, but Lara then destroys Himiko's ancient remains, saving Sam and dispersing the storms. Lara, Sam, Reyes and Jonah then leave the island and are picked up by a cargo ship: as they sail home, Lara realizes that the mythical stories her father told her were more than stories, deciding not to return home just yet, and the screen fades to white with a proclamation of "A Survivor is Born."

game.title: Ultimate Chicken Horse
game.description:
Ever wish you were a wall-jumping, arrow-dodging, trap-setting horse, besting your animal pals in a race through a peril-laden obstacle course that you all built together?

Wish granted!

Ultimate Chicken Horse is a party platformer where you and your friends build the level as you play, placing deadly traps before trying to reach the end of the level. If you can make it but your friends can't, you score points! Play online or locally with your animal buddies and experiment with a wide variety of platforms in all sorts of strange locations to find new ways to mess with your friends.

Key Features:
- Online and local play for up to 4 players
- Cross-platform play between PC, PS4, and Switch
- Unique game flow, from strategic block placement to twitch control platforming
- 15 levels with different features
- Build and share custom levels
- Compete for global best times on Challenge levels across all platforms
- Huge library of blocks to create an infinite variety of levels
- Customizable rule sets and game modes
- Shared controller mode to play multiplayer with one controller or keyboard
- Play as a chicken, horse, sheep, raccoon and other wonderful animals
- Fun, cartoony art style
- Sweet funky soundtrack

Please note: this is primarily a multiplayer game. Challenge levels can be created and played alone, but unlocking characters and levels requires playing one of the main game modes (like Party Mode) which are only multiplayer.

  Acerca del juego ¿Alguna vez has deseado ser un caballo trepamuros, esquivaflechas y colocador de trampas superando a tus peludos amigos en una carrera cargada de peligros en una pista que todos construís juntos?
 
 ¡Deseo concedido!
 
 Caballo Pollo Definitivo es un juego festivo de plataformas en el que tú y tus amigos construís el nivel mientras vais jugando, colocando trampas mortales antes de intentar alcanzar el final del nivel. Si lo consigues y tus amigos no ¡sumas puntos! Juega online o en local con tus amigos peludos y experimenta con una gran variedad de plataformas en todo tipo de ubicaciones variopintas para encontrar nuevas maneras de fastidiar a tus amigos.
 
    
 Únete a nosotros en Discord. Características clave:   Juego online y local para hasta 4 jugadores
   Dinámica de juego única, desde la colocación estratégica de los bloques a un control enloquecido de las plataformas
   13 niveles con diferentes funciones
   Construye y comparte niveles personalizados

  À propos du jeu N'avez-vous jamais rêvé d'être un cheval capable de sauter sur les murs, de tirer des flèches, de poser des pièges et de prendre le dessus sur vos amis animaux lors d'une course d'obstacles pleine de dangers que vous imaginez ensemble ? 
 
 Et bien votre vœu est exaucé ! 
 
 Ultimate Chicken Horse est un jeu de plateformes festif permettant à vos amis et à vous-même de construire le niveau tout en jouant, et de placer des pièges mortels avant de tenter d'atteindre la fin du niveau. Si vous y parvenez alors que vos amis n'y parviennent pas, vous remportez un point ! Jouez en ligne ou en local avec vos copains animaux et découvrez une large palette de plateformes dans toutes sortes d'endroits étranges vous offrant de nouveaux moyens de faire la bringue avec vos amis.

   Règles et modes de jeu personnalisables

   Incarnez un poulet, un cheval, un mouton, un raton laveur et d'autres animaux merveilleux 
   Graphismes fun et cartoonesques 
   Chouette bande-son funky
 
 Remarque : ce jeu est essentiellement multijoueur. Vous pourrez créer des niveaux Défi et y jouer seul, mais pour débloquer personnages et niveaux vous devrez jouer à l’un des modes principaux (comme le mode Party) qui sont exclusivement multijoueur.

 Wunsch erfüllt!
 
 Ultimate Chicken Horse ist ein Jump’n’Run-Spiel, bei dem du und deine Freunde während des Spiels das Level baut und tödliche Fallen platziert, um dann das Ziel zu erreichen. Wenn du dies schaffst, deine Freunde aber nicht, dann erhältst du Punkte. Spiele online oder mit deinen Freunde vor Ort und experimentiere mit einer großen Auswahl an Plattformen und verrückten Orten und finde immer neue Wege um deine Freunde in den Wahnsinn und den sicheren Tod zu treiben.
 
    
 Spiele auf Discord Wichtigste Merkmale   Online  und Offline-Spiel für bis zu 4 Spieler

  ゲームについて 仲間たちと一緒に構築した危険が満載の障害物コースで、壁を飛び越えたり、矢をかわしたり、罠を仕掛けたりしつつ、動物の友達と競争し彼らを出し抜き、レースをする馬になりたいと考えたことはありますか？
 
 その願いは叶います！
 
 アルティメイトチキンホースは、ステージの最後に到達しようとする前に致命的なトラップを仕掛けながら、あなたと友達でプレイしながらそのステージを構築していくパーティープラットフォーマーです。あなたが最後まで到達できて、友達ができない場合、あなたはポイントを獲得します！あなたの動物の友達とオンラインまたはローカルでプレイして、あらゆる種類の奇妙な場所にある多様なプラットフォームで実験し、友達をじゃまする新しい方法を見つけてください。
 
    
 Discordから参加してください
 
   オンラインとローカルで最大プレイヤー4人までプレイ
   戦略的なブロック配置からツイッチコントロールプラットフォームまで、ユニークなゲームの流れ 
   特徴が異なる18ステージ
   カスタムステージを作成そしてシェア
   チャレンジステージでは、全てのゲーム機種を通してグローバル・ベストタイムを競える
   無限に幅広いステージを作成するための巨大なブロックライブラリー 
   ルールやゲームモードをカスタマイズ可能
   コントローラー・シェアモードで、一つのコントローラーまたはキーボードを使い、マルチプレイヤーで遊べる
   鶏、馬、羊、および他の素晴らしい動物としてプレイ 
   楽しいアニメのようなアートスタイル 
   グルービーでファンキーなサウンドトラック

  About the Game Ever wish you were a wall-jumping, arrow-dodging, trap-setting horse, besting your animal pals in a race through a peril-laden obstacle course that you all built together?
 
 Wish Granted!
 
 Ultimate Chicken Horse is a party platformer where you and your friends build the level as you play, placing deadly traps before trying to reach the end of the level. If you can make it but your friends can't, you score points! Play online or locally with your animal buddies and experiment with a wide variety of platforms in all sorts of strange locations to find new ways to mess with your friends. Key Features   Online, cross-platform, and local play for up to 4 players
   Unique game flow, from strategic block placement to twitch control platforming
   21 levels with different features 
   Build and share custom levels
   Compete for global best times on Challenge levels across all platforms
   Huge library of blocks to create an infinite variety of levels
   Customizable rule sets and game modes
   Shared controller mode to play multiplayer with one controller or keyboard
   Play as a chicken, horse, sheep, raccoon and other wonderful animals
   Fun, cartoony art style
   Sweet funky soundtrack
 
 
 Please note: this is primarily a multiplayer game. Challenge levels can be created and played alone, but unlocking characters and levels requires playing one of the main game modes (like Party Mode) which are only multiplayer.

Wishlist Ultimate Sheep Raccoon!        
 
  Acerca del juego ¿Alguna vez has deseado ser un caballo trepamuros, esquivaflechas y colocador de trampas superando a tus peludos amigos en una carrera cargada de peligros en una pista que todos construís juntos?
 
 ¡Deseo concedido!
 
 Caballo Pollo Definitivo es un juego festivo de plataformas en el que tú y tus amigos construís el nivel mientras vais jugando, colocando trampas mortales antes de intentar alcanzar el final del nivel. Si lo consigues y tus amigos no ¡sumas puntos! Juega online o en local con tus amigos peludos y experimenta con una gran variedad de plataformas en todo tipo de ubicaciones variopintas para encontrar nuevas maneras de fastidiar a tus amigos. Características clave:   Juego online y local para hasta 4 jugadores
   Dinámica de juego única, desde la colocación estratégica de los bloques a un control enloquecido de las plataformas
   13 niveles con diferentes funciones
   Construye y comparte niveles personalizados
   Compite por los mejores tiempos globales en niveles de desafío a través de todas las plataformas
   Gran librería de bloques para crear una variedad ilimitada de niveles
   Modos de juego y reglas personalizables
   Modo controlador compartido para jugar al multijugador con un mando o teclado
   Juega como un pollo, un caballo, una oveja, un mapache y otros magníficos animales
   Divertido estilo animado
   Una preciosa banda sonora funky    Recuerda: Esto es, principalmente, un juego multijugador. Se pueden crear niveles de desafío y jugar en solitario, pero al desbloquear personajes y niveles hay que jugar en uno de los modos de juego principales (como el modo Fiesta), que solo funcionan en multijugador.

Wishlist Ultimate Sheep Raccoon!  Notre prochain party game de courses à vélo, sortie prévue pour l’hiver 2025!
 
       
 
  À propos du jeu N'avez-vous jamais rêvé d'être un cheval capable de sauter sur les murs, de tirer des flèches, de poser des pièges et de prendre le dessus sur vos amis animaux lors d'une course d'obstacles pleine de dangers que vous imaginez ensemble ? 
 
 Et bien votre vœu est exaucé ! 
 
 Ultimate Chicken Horse est un jeu de plateformes festif permettant à vos amis et à vous-même de construire le niveau tout en jouant, et de placer des pièges mortels avant de tenter d'atteindre la fin du niveau. Si vous y parvenez alors que vos amis n'y parviennent pas, vous remportez un point ! Jouez en ligne ou en local avec vos copains animaux et découvrez une large palette de plateformes dans toutes sortes d'endroits étranges vous offrant de nouveaux moyens de faire la bringue avec vos amis. Fonctionnalités principales   Jeu en ligne et local jusqu’à quatre joueurs
   Déroulement unique allant du placement stratégique de blocs au jeu de plateformes aux contrôles pointus
   18 niveaux aux fonctionnalités diverses
   Construisez et partagez vos niveaux personnalisés
   Affrontez-vous pour battre des records dans les niveaux Défi sur toutes les plateformes
   Énorme bibliothèque de blocs permettant de créer une infinité de niveaux
   Règles et modes de jeu personnalisables
   Mode Partage de manette pour jouer en multijoueur avec un clavier ou une manette 
   Incarnez un poulet, un cheval, un mouton, un raton laveur et d'autres animaux merveilleux 
   Graphismes fun et cartoonesques 
   Chouette bande-son funky   Remarque : ce jeu est essentiellement multijoueur. Vous pourrez créer des niveaux Défi et y jouer seul, mais pour débloquer personnages et niveaux vous devrez jouer à l’un des modes principaux (comme le mode Party) qui sont exclusivement multijoueur.

Wishlist Ultimate Sheep Raccoon!        
 
  Infos zum Spiel Du wolltest schon immer mal ein springendes, sich vor Pfeilen duckendes, fallenstellendes Pferd sein, das seine Tierfreunde in einem Rennen durch einen risikoreichen Hindernislauf, den du selbst zusammengebaut hast, besiegt?
 
 Wunsch erfüllt!
 
 Ultimate Chicken Horse ist ein Jump’n’Run-Spiel, bei dem du und deine Freunde während des Spiels das Level baut und tödliche Fallen platziert, um dann das Ziel zu erreichen. Wenn du dies schaffst, deine Freunde aber nicht, dann erhältst du Punkte. Spiele online oder mit deinen Freunde vor Ort und experimentiere mit einer großen Auswahl an Plattformen und verrückten Orten und finde immer neue Wege um deine Freunde in den Wahnsinn und den sicheren Tod zu treiben. Wichtigste Merkmale   Online  und Offline-Spiel für bis zu 4 Spieler
   einzigartiges Spielerlebnis, von strategischen Blockplatzierungen zu dynamischen Plattformen
   18 verschiedene Level
   baue eigene Level und spiele sie gemeinsam mit anderen
   plattformübergreifende Herausforderungs-Level und Bestenlisten
   große Sammlung an Blocks zur Erschaffung von unterschiedlichen Levels
   individuell anpassbare Regeln und Spielmodi
   Modus mit geteiltem Controller, damit Multiplayer-Spiele auch mit einem Controller oder einer Tastatur möglich sind
   Spiele als Huhn, Pferd, Schaf oder als ein anderes tolles Tier
   lustige, cartoonartige Grafik
   cooler Soundtrack    Hinweis: Dies ist vor allem als Multiplayer-Spiel gedacht. Herausforderungs-Level können auch alleine erstellt und gespielt werden, aber neue Figuren und Level können nur in den Haupt-Multiplayer-Spielmodi (zum Beispiel Party-Modus) erreicht werden.

Wishlist Ultimate Sheep Raccoon!  Our upcoming bike-racing party game, releasing Winter 2025!
 
       
 
  Acerca do jogo Já desejou ser um cavalo que salta por paredes, se esquiva de flechas e faz armadilhas, superando seus amigos animais numa corrida por uma pista de obstáculos que todos vocês criaram juntos?
 
 Desejo concedido!
 
 O Ultimate Chicken Horse é um jogo de plataforma coletivo, no qual você e seus amigos criam a fase enquanto jogam, colocando armadilhas mortais antes de tentar chegar ao fim da fase. Se você conseguir, mas seus amigos não, você marca pontos! Jogue online ou localmente com seus companheiros animais e teste uma ampla variedade de plataformas em todos os tipos de lugares para encontrar novas formas de provocar seus amigos. Principais características   Jogo online e local para até 4 jogadores
   Fluxo de jogo único, de posicionamento de blocos à plataforma controlada por interruptores
   18 fases com diferentes características 
   Crie e compartilhe fases personalizadas
   Compita pelos melhores tempos mundiais em fases de desafio em todas as plataformas
   Imensa biblioteca de blocos para criar uma variedade infinita de fases
   Conjunto de regras e modos de jogos personalizáveis
   Modo de controle compartilhado para vários jogadores, com um controle ou teclado
   Jogue como o Galinha, o Cavalo, a Ovelha, o Guaxinim e outros animais maravilhosos
   Arte divertida, no estilo cartum
   Trilha sonora divertida    Atenção: esse é um jogo essencialmente multijogador As fases de desafio podem ser criadas e jogadas em modo solo, mas para desbloquear os personagens e fases é necessário jogar um dos modos principais (como o modo Balada) que são apenas multijogador.

 Wish Granted!
 
 Ultimate Chicken Horse is a party platformer where you and your friends build the level as you play, placing deadly traps before trying to reach the end of the level. Wishlist Ultimate Sheep Raccoon!        
 
  Informazioni sul gioco Hai mai desiderato sfidare i tuo amici saltando da un muro all’altro, schivando frecce e piazzando trappole nei panni di un cavallo in un percorso ad ostacoli irto di pericoli che voi stessi avete costruito? Desiderio esaudito! Ultimate Chicken Horse è un platformer di gruppo dove tu e i tuoi amici potete costrure i livelli in cui giocare, piazzando trappole mortali prima di cimentarvi nella corsa. Se tu ce la fai ma i tuoi amici no, fai punti! Gioca online o in locale con i tuoi amici animali e sperimenta una vasta gamma di piattaforme in ogni sorta di strano paesaggio per trovare nuovi modi di far arrabbiare i tuoi amici. Caratteristiche principali   Gioco locale e online fino a 4 giocatori
   Stile di gioco unico, dal posizionamento strategico dei blocchi al frenetico platforming 
   18 livelli con caratteristiche diverse
   Costruisci e condividi i livelli personalizzati
   Competi per i tempi migliori globali nei livelli di sfida attraverso tutte le piattaforme
   Vasta scelta di blocchi per creare un’infinita varietà di livelli 
   Set di regole e modalità di gioco personalizzabili
   Modalità di condivisione del controller per giocare in multigiocatore con un controller o la tastiera
   Gioca nei panni di un pollo, un cavallo, una pecora, un procione e altri fantastici animali 
   Design buffo e cartoonesco 
   Colonna sonora originale e divertente    Avviso: questo gioco è principalmente per multigiocatore. I livelli di sfida possono essere creati e giocati da soli, ma per sbloccare i personaggi e i livelli è richiesto di giocare a una delle modalità di gioco principali (come la modalità Party) che sono solo per multigiocatore.

game.brief:
Ever wish you were a wall-jumping, arrow-dodging, trap-setting horse, besting your animal pals in a race through a peril-laden obstacle course that you all built together?

Wish granted!

Ultimate Chicken Horse is a party platformer where you and your friends build the level as you play, placing deadly traps before trying to reach the end of the level. If you can make it but your friends can't, you score points! Play online or locally with your animal buddies and experiment with a wide variety of platforms in all sorts of strange locations to find new ways to mess with your friends.

Key Features:
- Online and local play for up to 4 players
- Cross-platform play between PC, PS4, and Switch
- Unique game flow, from strategic block placement to twitch control platforming
- 15 levels with different features
- Build and share custom levels
- Compete for global best times on Challenge levels across all platforms
- Huge library of blocks to create an infinite variety of levels
- Customizable rule sets and game modes
- Shared controller mode to play multiplayer with one controller or keyboard
- Play as a chicken, horse, sheep, raccoon and other wonderful animals
- Fun, cartoony art style
- Sweet funky soundtrack

Please note: this is primarily a multiplayer game. Challenge levels can be created and played alone, but unlocking characters and levels requires playing one of the main game modes (like Party Mode) which are only multiplayer.

game.title: No Man's Sky
game.description:
Inspired by the adventure and imagination that we love from classic science-fiction, No Man's Sky presents you with a galaxy to explore, filled with unique planets and lifeforms, and constant danger and action. 
  
  In No Man's Sky, every star is the light of a distant sun, each orbited by planets filled with life, and you can go to any of them you choose. Fly smoothly from deep space to planetary surfaces, with no loading screens, and no limits. In this infinite procedurally generated universe, you'll discover places and creatures that no other players have seen before - and perhaps never will again. 
  Now including...  Play with all major updates since launch: Foundation, Pathfinder, Atlas Rises, NEXT, The Abyss, Visions, the 2.0 BEYOND update, Synthesis, Living Ship, Exo Mech, Desolation and the 3.0 update, ORIGINS, Next Generation, Companions, Expeditions, Prisms, Frontiers, Sentinel, Outlaws, Endurance, Waypoint (4.0),  Fractal, Interceptor, Echoes, Omega, Orbital and Worlds Part I (5.0).
  And now with added  Cross-Save ! No Man’s Sky now supports  Cross-Play  and  Cross-Save  between a huge number of platforms including PC, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, PlayStation 5 Pro, Xbox One and Series X/S, Game Pass, GOG, Nintendo Switch, Steam Deck, PlayStation VR 1 & 2 and PCVR.
  
  Available for PC and Mac (see recommended and minimum specs for details). 
  
  An epic voyage to the centre of a shared universe awaits, allowing you to explore, trade, fight and survive alone or with friends. 
  Embark on an epic voyage  At the centre of the galaxy lies a irresistible pulse which draws you on a journey towards it to learn the true nature of the cosmos. But, facing hostile creatures and fierce pirates, you'll know that death comes at a cost, and survival will be down to the choices you make over how you upgrade your ship, your weapon and suit. 
  Find your own destiny  Your voyage through No Man's Sky is up to you. Will you be a fighter, preying on the weak and taking their riches, or taking out pirates for their bounties? Power is yours if you upgrade your ship for speed and weaponry. 
  
  Or a trader? Find rich resources on forgotten worlds and exploit them for the highest prices. Invest in more cargo space and you'll reap huge rewards. 
  Or perhaps an explorer? Go beyond the known frontier and discover places and things that no one has ever seen before. Upgrade your engines to jump ever farther, and strengthen your suit for survival in toxic environments that would kill the unwary. 
  Share your journey  The galaxy is a living, breathing place. Trade convoys travel between stars, factions vie for territory, pirates hunt the unwary, and the police are ever watching. Every other player lives in the same galaxy, and you can choose to share your discoveries with them on a map that spans known space. Perhaps you will see the results of their actions as well as your own...

  Or perhaps an explorer? Go beyond the known frontier and discover places and things that no one has ever seen before. Upgrade your engines to jump ever farther, and strengthen your suit for survival in toxic environments that would kill the unwary. 
  Share your journey  The galaxy is a living, breathing place. Trade convoys travel between stars, factions vie for territory, pirates hunt the unwary, and the police are ever watching. Every other player lives in the same galaxy, and you can choose to share your discoveries with them on a map that spans known space. Perhaps you will see the results of their actions as well as your own...

Inspired by the adventure and imagination that we love from classic science-fiction, No Man's Sky presents you with a galaxy to explore, filled with unique planets and lifeforms, and constant danger and action. 
  
  In No Man's Sky, every star is the light of a distant sun, each orbited by planets filled with life, and you can go to any of them you choose. Fly smoothly from deep space to planetary surfaces, with no loading screens, and no limits. In this infinite procedurally generated universe, you'll discover places and creatures that no other players have seen before - and perhaps never will again. 
  Now including...  Play with all major updates since launch: Foundation, Pathfinder, Atlas Rises, NEXT, The Abyss, Visions, the 2.0 BEYOND update, Synthesis, Living Ship, Exo Mech, Desolation and the 3.0 update, ORIGINS, Next Generation, Companions, Expeditions, Prisms, Frontiers, Sentinel, Outlaws, Endurance, Waypoint (4.0),  Fractal, Interceptor, Echoes, Omega, Orbital and Worlds Part I (5.0).
  And now with added  Cross-Save ! No Man’s Sky now supports  Cross-Play  and  Cross-Save  between a huge number of platforms including PC, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, PlayStation 5 Pro, Xbox One and Series X/S, Game Pass, GOG, Nintendo Switch, Steam Deck, PlayStation VR 1 & 2 and PCVR.
  
  Available for PC and Mac (see recommended and minimum specs for details). 
  
  An epic voyage to the centre of a shared universe awaits, allowing you to explore, trade, fight and survive alone or with friends. 
  Embark on an epic voyage  At the centre of the galaxy lies a irresistible pulse which draws you on a journey towards it to learn the true nature of the cosmos. But, facing hostile creatures and fierce pirates, you'll know that death comes at a cost, and survival will be down to the choices you make over how you upgrade your ship, your weapon and suit.
